channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pantami Rejects APC Consensus Candidate for 2027 Gombe Governorship, Calls for Direct Primaries
item.description: For Gombe State, wahala don burst inside the APC as former Communications Minister, Dr Isa Ali Pantami, don sharply reject the adoption of Jamilu Gwamna as the party’s consensus governorship candidate...

item.title: South Africa's Struggling Transition from Coal to Renewable Energy
item.description: South Africa's energy landscape is at a crossroads, with the country still heavily dependent on coal despite ongoing commitments to shift towards renewable energy. The completion of Kusile Power Stati...

item.title: Manchester United clinch Champions League spot with late winner against Liverpool
item.description: Manchester United confirmed their return to the Champions League after a thrilling 3-2 victory over Liverpool at Old Trafford. The match saw United take a commanding 2-0 lead by half-time through goal...

item.title: Professionals and Government Employees Challenge Electoral Roll Deletions in West Bengal
item.description: KOLKATA: A significant number of professionals and government employees in West Bengal have moved the Calcutta High Court following their names being removed from the state’s electoral rolls under the...

item.title: NAB Reports Ongoing Cashflow Pressure for Small Businesses Amid Lending Growth
item.description: National Australia Bank (NAB) has reported that small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) are likely to continue experiencing cashflow pressures over the coming months. The bank highlighted that its t...

item.title: House lawmakers express confidence in strength of impeachment case against VP Duterte
item.description: Several members of the Philippine House of Representatives, along with their legal counsel, expressed confidence that the impeachment case against Vice President Sara Duterte has a strong basis and is...

item.title: Rudy Giuliani, Former New York Mayor, Hospitalised in Critical Condition
item.description: Rudy Giuliani, the former mayor of New York City, has been hospitalised in Florida in critical but stable condition. The reasons for his admission have not been disclosed. Giuliani, aged 81, has long ...

item.title: Major legal challenges this week on Legal Sector Code and NHI Act
item.description: This week, South African courts are set to hear two significant legal challenges affecting the country's legal and healthcare frameworks. In Pretoria, the Gauteng High Court will consider a case broug...

item.title: Artist KC Green accuses AI startup Artisan of unauthorized use of his ‘This is fine’ comic in advertising
item.description: Cartoonist KC Green, best known for creating the widely recognized “This is fine” comic, has accused AI startup Artisan of using his artwork without permission in a recent advertising campaign. The or...

item.title: Toronto Police Identify Victim and Suspect in North York Homicide
item.description: Toronto police have confirmed the identities of both the victim and the suspect involved in a fatal shooting in North York. The incident, which has sent shockwaves through the local community, is curr...

item.title: Lucy Powell emphasises long-term strategy as Labour faces potential local election setbacks
item.description: Labour's deputy leader, Lucy Powell, has stated that there is 'no magic bullet' to resolve the party's current difficulties or the broader challenges facing the country. Speaking to the Guardian durin...

item.title: Trump Attends PGA Tour at Doral Amid Domestic Economic Concerns and Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump attended the PGA Tour at his Doral resort in Florida over the weekend, interacting with celebrity golfers and viewing the event from a spectator box. He was seen watching Camero...

item.title: Man Charged After Injuring Himself During Attempted Home Invasion in Hamilton
item.description: A 21-year-old man is facing multiple charges after accidentally shooting himself while attempting a home invasion in Hamilton, Ontario. Police say the man entered a residence on the city’s east side a...

item.title: West Bengal Election Results: Counting of Votes for 294 Seats Begins Today
item.description: The state of West Bengal is witnessing intense political action as the counting of votes for 294 assembly seats takes place today. The primary question on everyone’s mind is whether Bengal’s so-called...

item.title: Toronto Maple Leafs appoint Mats Sundin and John Chayka to lead hockey operations reset
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have unveiled a major overhaul of their hockey operations leadership, appointing former captain Mats Sundin as senior executive adviser and naming John Chayka as general manage...

item.title: Iran conflict and energy crisis speed up global transition away from fossil fuels
item.description: The article argues that the ongoing confrontation between the United States and Iran, particularly around the Strait of Hormuz, is unintentionally accelerating the global transition away from fossil f...

item.title: Hantavirus suspected on MV Hondius cruise ship results in three deaths and one critical patient
item.description: A suspected outbreak of Hantavirus on the MV Hondius, a polar cruise ship operated by Oceanwide Expeditions, has tragically resulted in three deaths and left another passenger in intensive care. The s...

item.title: The Truth Behind Intermittent Fasting: Benefits, Risks, and Who It Works For
item.description: Intermittent fasting (IF) has gained popularity as a health trend, but its effectiveness varies from person to person. Unlike traditional diets that focus on what you eat, IF is all about when you eat...

item.title: Alaska Highway closed near Beaver Creek due to flooding
item.description: The Alaska Highway has been temporarily closed just north of Beaver Creek in the Yukon due to flooding, affecting the section from the U.S. border to the Beaver Creek Canada Customs office. Government...

item.title: Labour Party Unveils Timetable for 2027 Elections, Sets Dates and Fees for Primaries
item.description: The Labour Party don come out with their timetable and programme for the 2027 general elections. According to the party, their primaries go happen in two main phases: House of Assembly and governorshi...
